channel.title: project on Prakhar Jain
channel.description: Recent content in project on Prakhar Jain

item.title: Timetable Application
item.description: The application creates a personalised Timetable for College based on your Core subjects, Electives and Subdivision specific Labs. This Timetable can be resized and edited. It can then be downloaded. The Timetable uses html2canvas to take a screenshot of the Timetable. It uses Javascript and JQuery to add the editing options. The application can be viewed here .
